title: Packaging Config
description: Packaging Config v1 contract for B1/B2/B3 material planning and packaging outputs per batch.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Operational Config requirement and PACK-03 B1/B2/B3 rules. TODO: package size and pack/box/carton conversion lists are not finalized.

b1_buffer_rate.description: B1 planning buffer rate, initially 7% by PACK-03 but configurable by owner.

b2_buffer_rate.description: B2 planning buffer rate, initially 7% by PACK-03 but configurable by owner.

b3_policy.description: B3 stock policy or consumption-per-batch policy. B3 does not automatically use the 7% buffer.
